# Measurement of DFA-disabled CADA and ACFA
### 
This file contains our measurements and runtime evidence for DFA-disabled CADA

**Disclaimer**: *All runtime results are based on the `App/attack_app/` source files and the corresponding input, which are in our DFA-disabled CADA codebase. All the Measurement results are generated by the source files of `App/`  and the corresponding input, which are also in our DFA-disabled CADA codebase.
This repo only presents results supporting RQ2 in the paper.*
## Folders Description
- `ACFA_log/`: the reproduced results of ACFA.
- `Evaluation/`: this folder contains the app's runtime evidence in RQ2.
- `Measurement/`: this folder contains the app's Measurements in RQ2.
- `database_verfy.py`: This file can verify that the runtime evidence of the application conforms to the Measurements.
